tasks_project_or_contact_chk.name: tasks_project_or_contact_chk
tasks_project_or_contact_chk.value: "tasks"."project_id" IS NOT NULL OR "tasks"."contact_id" IS NOT NULL

notification_preferences_user_isolation.name: notification_preferences_user_isolation
notification_preferences_user_isolation.using: organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org', true) AND user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
notification_preferences_user_isolation.withCheck: organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org', true) AND user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)

notifications_read_write.name: notifications_read_write
notifications_read_write.using: organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org', true) AND recipient_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
notifications_read_write.withCheck: organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org', true) AND recipient_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
